name: uno-platform
description: Skills for Uno Platform cross-platform development including MVVM, XAML correctness, Fluent design, navigation, responsive layouts, C# Markup 2 (CSharpForMarkup), agentic app run support, and testing.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-platform Uno skills for MVVM, XAML, design, navigation, layout, app run support, C# Markup 2, and testing
interface.longDescription: Use Uno Platform to access reusable cross-platform development skills for MVVM, XAML correctness, Fluent design, data-bound navigation, responsive layouts, theme-aware charting, code-first UI with C# Markup 2 (CSharpForMarkup), agentic app run support, and test workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use the Uno Platform plugin to help with MVVM, XAML correctness, layout, navigation, theming, C# Markup 2 UI, agentic app run support, or testing.
